title: Persona 3 Reload Menu BGM
description: Jam out to a small selection of songs from Persona 3 Reload on the main menu!
body:
Persona games always output top-level music, and _my goodness_ is P3R **not** an exception. Using this pack, you can jam out to 20 selected tracks from the gamerip. Includes proper artist and song info for music toasts in English US.

**Persona 3 Reload:**

- Mass Destruction
- Master of Tartarus
- Master of Shadow
- Iwatodai Dorm
- During the Exams
- Deep Mentality
- Burn My Dread
- Battle Hymn of the Soul
- Memories of the City
- Color Your Night
- Paulownia Mall
- Tartarus Block 1
- Tartarus Block 6
- When The Moon's Reaching Out Stars
- Aria of the Soul

**Episode Aigis (New)**:

- Abyss of Time: Block 2
- Darkness
- Mass Destruction (P3fes Reload)
- Don't
- Heartful Cry
